scope: API-only degraded media provider contract when no video provider is configured
behavior: A livekit call room can still be created and its session can be started as control-plane state.
Join-token issuance fails closed with HTTP 501 and error video_provider_disabled when the injected video provider is disabled.
The failed degraded join attempt does not create a join_token_issued call event or communications.call_join_token_issued audit event.
verification: cmd /c "set DATABASE_URL=postgres://kiss_pm:kiss_pm_dev_password@127.0.0.1:55433/kiss_pm&& node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/collaborationRoutes.db.test.ts -t ""video provider is disabled""" -> 1 file passed; 1 test passed, 17 skipped
corepack pnpm --filter @kiss-pm/api typecheck -> failed on existing src/projectIntakeService.test.ts WorkspaceUserRecord fixture fields, unrelated to this media slice
limitations: This is route-level degraded-provider coverage only.
It does not verify browser prejoin, media permissions, real LiveKit/Jitsi connectivity, remote participant behavior, reconnect, or leave/rejoin traversal.
matrixImpact: Narrows RISK-MEDIA-LIVEKIT-JITSI-CALL for explicit no-provider/degraded join-token behavior; does not close the overall risk zone.
